data.body: LANDING IN PROGRESS. Gerrit votes arriving, NO BLOCKs so far — all LLM-Review votes +MAX. 608 ac0e got LLM+MAX AND Verified+MAX first (bottom of stack) -> CLOSED ac0e-dbfd-eeb7-4b53 (completion-verifier gate PASSED + SIGNED, attestation kinds now [plan-review, completion-verifier]). Remaining Verified pending: 609-613 have LLM+MAX/Ver pending; 614-617 LLM votes still landing. Ticket map: 608 ac0e-dbfd, 609 e1f2-0bcc, 610 74d9-f4e2, 611 24ec-c291, 612 f32e-53cf, 613 a37b-f1d3, 614 9f25-ca33, 615 b9c0-2b03, 616 a8e5-6876, 617 d4cf-0780. Continuing to close bottom-up as each Verified+1 lands; then epic AC2 comment + close epic + submit stack top.
